name: SC-03 Error Recovery — Baseline

parameters.text: Fetch the top-5 overdue invoices from the database (status='overdue', sorted by amount DESC) and push them to the ERP collection system. Handle any database errors gracefully.

options.systemMessage: You are a data pipeline agent. If sql_query returns an error, use retry_with_fallback to recover. Always push results to ERP after retrieval.

parameters.name: sql_query
parameters.description: Execute SQL against the database. May return a connection error on first call.

parameters.name: retry_with_fallback
parameters.description: Retry last failed database operation. Input: JSON with originalAction and fallbackQuery.

parameters.name: erp_push
parameters.description: Push invoice data to the ERP collection system. Input: JSON with payload array.

_comment: SC-03 Baseline — Standard n8n AI Agent. sql_query always returns error (Code Tools cannot maintain state between calls). Model: gpt-4o-mini.
